---
title: "EPPS 6354 Information Management | Spring 2026"
format: html
---

## Assignments

-   [Assignment 1 - February 5th, 2026](6354-A1.qmd)

-   [Assignment 2 - February 12th, 2026](6354-A2.qmd)

-   [Assignment 3 - February 19th, 2026](6354-A3.qmd)

-   [Assignment 4 - February 26th, 2026](6354-A4.qmd)

## Class Project

### Pitch Deck

<details>

<summary><strong>Or Click to Show/Hide Pitch Deck</strong></summary>

::: {style="margin: 1em 0;"}
<a href="6354PitchDeck.pdf" download
     style="padding: 10px 16px; background-color: #2c3e50; color: white; 
            text-decoration: none; border-radius: 6px; font-weight: bold;"> ⬇ Download Pitch Deck </a>
:::

<iframe src="6354PitchDeck.pdf#toolbar=1" width="100%" height="800px" style="border: none; margin-top: 1em;" allow="fullscreen" allowfullscreen>

</iframe>

</details>
